memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Miles Stapleton
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Miles Stapleton, KG (1395 – 1 October 1466) was Lord of the Manor of Ingham, Norfolk and de jure Baron Ingham of Ingham, Norfolk, and Lord of the Manor of Bedale, North Yorkshire.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Will of Lady Jane Hudleston
memoryArtifacts.description: Lady Jane Stapleton was Married Twice. The First was to Sir Christopher Harcourt (four or five children) and the Second one was to Sir John Hudleston (one son, named John).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Miles Stapleton於1408年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可英厄姆時，他的父親Sir Brian Stapleton29歲，母親Cecily Bardolph29歲。他於大約1415年與Elizabeth Felbrigge結婚。他於1440年在英國諾福爾可被列為high sherff。他去世於1466年10月1日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可享年58歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可英厄姆。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain derivation. Unlike most Norman names it is, as far as can be ascertained, not derived from any known Old French or Germanic name element. It may be a greatly altered pet form of Michael , which came to be associated with the Latin word miles ‘soldier’ because of the military attributes of the archangel Michael. However, the usual Latin form of the name in the Middle Ages was Milo. There is a common Slavic name element mil ‘grace, favour’, with which it may possibly have some connection. The name has been in regular use in England since the 16th century. See also Milo and Myles .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Miles Stapleton was born in 1408, in Ingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Brian Stapleton, was 29 and his mother, Cecily Bardolph, was 29. He married Elizabeth Felbrigge about 1415. In 1440, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as high sherff in Norfolk, England. He died on 1 October 1466, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Ingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Miles Stapleton est né en 1408, à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Brian Stapleton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Cecily Bardolph, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Felbrigge environ 1415. En 1440, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sherff à Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 octobre 1466, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Miles Stapleton 1408 in Ingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Brian Stapleton 29 und seine Mutter Cecily Bardolph 29. Er hat um 1415 Elizabeth Felbrigge geheiratet. 1440, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sherff in Norfolk, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Oktober 1466 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Felbrigge circa 1415. Nel 1440, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sherff nel Norfolk, England. Morì il 1 ottobre 1466, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Ingham, Norfolk, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Miles Stapleton(이)가 1408년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Brian Stapleton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Bardolph(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1415년 Elizabeth Felbrigge(와)과 결혼했다. 1440년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 노르폴크에서 high sherff이었다. 그는 1466년 10월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Miles Stapleton nasceu em 1408, em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Brian Stapleton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Bardolph, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Felbrigge aproximadamente 1415. Em 1440, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sherff em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1466, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Miles Stapleton родился в 1408 г. в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Brian Stapleton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Bardolph, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Felbrigge около 1415 г. В 1440 году, в возрасте 32 лет,  он работал по профессии high sherff в местности норфолк, Англия. Он умер 1 октября 1466 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия.
